title: Run venture product planning
goal: Translate approved feature brief into milestone plan with status model, dependencies, and risk controls.

steps.text: Load approved feature brief and extract delivery-relevant scope.
Define milestone sequence with owners, dependencies, and exit criteria.
Identify top risks, blocker conditions, and required decisions.
Apply venture product quality gate to planning artifact and record result.
Pause for AJ review before execution handoff.

acceptanceCriteria: Milestones use standard fields and explicit status model
Plan remains bounded to approved feature scope

verification.text: Confirm plan includes milestone ID, owner, status, risks, dependencies, and exit criteria
Confirm quality gate classification is present and justified
